name: Shahi Majra
overview: Shahi Majra is the story of Agam, a small-town village girl who moves to Chandigarh for her education but falls prey to the appealing yet dangerous city lifestyle. Will she survive?

trailers.title: Shahi Majra (Official Trailer) | Ninja | Nikeet Dhillon | Sawan Rupowali | Chaupal Original
